backupInfo:
• Backups are saved as .zip file
• Contains: All documents, settings and metadata
• Backups stay local on your device
• You can manually import backups on other devices
backupsDetailed: Your backups are stored locally on your device. You can manually export and import them.
cat_arbeitsvertrag_summary: This is an employment contract that regulates the relationship between employer and employee. It contains important details such as gross salary, working hours, probation period, vacation days, and notice periods. This is one of the most important documents for your career and financial security, as it defines your rights and obligations as an employee. The document should be carefully read and understood before you sign it.
cat_arbeitsvertrag_step1: Read the entire contract carefully – pay attention to salary, vacation, probation period, and notice periods.
cat_arbeitsvertrag_step2: Request a signed copy from your employer.
cat_arbeitsvertrag_step3: Inform social insurance and health insurance.
cat_arbeitsvertrag_step4: Note all important dates in your calendar (end of probation, notice periods).
cat_arbeitsvertrag_step5: Save a copy digitally and in paper form.
cat_stromvertrag_summary: This is an electricity supply contract or summary of your electricity contract with the provider. It contains details such as unit price (price per kWh), base fee (monthly service charge), prepayment amount, contract duration, and cancellation notice period. This is an important contract for your home as it determines your energy costs and supply. You should regularly check if prices are competitive and consider switching providers if needed.
cat_stromvertrag_step1: Check the unit price (price per kWh) carefully.
cat_stromvertrag_step2: Check the base fee and understand what it includes.
cat_stromvertrag_step3: Pay attention to contract duration – typically 12 or 24 months.
cat_stromvertrag_step4: Understand the cancellation notice period – can you cancel when you want?
cat_stromvertrag_step5: Compare with other providers to ensure you are not overpaying.
cat_internetvertrag_summary: This is a contract summary for internet or mobile services. It contains the monthly price, activation fee, contract duration, cancellation notice period, data volume, or download speed. This is an important service for your daily life. The main risks are long contract periods and hidden fees. You should always read the terms before signing up.
cat_internetvertrag_step1: Check the monthly price – was it discounted at the beginning?
cat_internetvertrag_step2: Check the contract duration – is it 24 months or longer?
cat_internetvertrag_step3: Pay attention to the cancellation notice period – when can you cancel?
cat_internetvertrag_step4: Check data volume or download speed – is it sufficient for your needs?
cat_internetvertrag_step5: Watch for activation fees and other hidden costs.
cat_versicherungsvertrag_allgemein_summa: This is an insurance contract or insurance application that specifies the type of insurance, coverage, sum insured, and monthly premium. This is an important document for your protection. Insurance protects you from risks (such as damage or liability), but it costs money monthly. You should read the insurance terms to understand what is covered and what is not.
cat_versicherungsvertrag_allgemein_step1: Determine the type of insurance (liability, household contents, legal protection, etc.).
cat_versicherungsvertrag_allgemein_step3: Read the insurance terms and conditions fully.
cat_versicherungsvertrag_allgemein_step4: Understand what is covered and what may not be covered.
cat_versicherungsvertrag_allgemein_step5: Do not sign until you understand everything.
cat_kaufvertrag_summary: This is a purchase contract that establishes the agreement between buyer and seller for purchasing a product or property. It contains information about the product, purchase price, payment method, any known defects, and delivery date. This is an important legal document that protects both parties. You should understand all terms and check all details, especially defects and delivery dates.
cat_kaufvertrag_step1: Check the purchase price – is it correct?
cat_kaufvertrag_step2: Read the product description carefully – does it match?
cat_kaufvertrag_step3: Check known defects – are you willing to accept them?
cat_kaufvertrag_step4: Check the delivery date – can you work with it?
cat_kaufvertrag_step5: Sign only if all details are correct.
cat_ratenzahlungsvertrag_summary: This is an installment payment contract for purchasing on credit. It specifies the purchase price, monthly payment, number of installments, down payment, and especially the annual percentage rate (interest rate). This is an important contract because it involves debt. The main risks are high interest rates and long binding periods. You should always check the annual percentage rate and compare it with other credit offers before agreeing.
cat_ratenzahlungsvertrag_step1: Check the monthly payment – can you pay it regularly?
cat_ratenzahlungsvertrag_step2: Calculate the total price (all installments + down payment) – is it more expensive than paying in cash?
cat_ratenzahlungsvertrag_step3: Check the annual percentage rate – is it reasonable?
cat_ratenzahlungsvertrag_step4: Check the number of installments – does it match your financial plans?
cat_ratenzahlungsvertrag_step5: Compare with bank loans – is the installment contract more expensive?
cat_mitgliedschaftsvertrag_summary: This is a membership or subscription contract for a service (gym, Netflix, app, etc.). It specifies the monthly fee, minimum duration, cancellation notice period, and scope of services. This is a contract that requires regular payments. The main risks are automatic renewals and long cancellation notice periods, causing you to forget to cancel. You should always write down the cancellation notice period in your calendar and cancel in time to avoid unwanted renewals.
cat_mitgliedschaftsvertrag_step1: Check the monthly fee – can you afford it?
cat_mitgliedschaftsvertrag_step2: Check the minimum duration – how long are you bound?
cat_mitgliedschaftsvertrag_step3: Understand the cancellation notice period – how long in advance must you cancel?
cat_mitgliedschaftsvertrag_step4: Write down the cancellation notice period in your calendar – do not miss the deadline!
cat_mitgliedschaftsvertrag_step5: Check if there is automatic renewal – beware of surprises.
cat_vertrag_kuendigung_summary: This message means that the contract is being terminated and the contractual relationship ends on the specified date. This could be because you or the company have submitted the termination. This is not an emergency, but it is an important milestone. You should check the end date and ensure that all outstanding matters are completed (such as device return or outstanding payments). It is also important to save a copy of the cancellation notice as proof.
cat_vertrag_kuendigung_step1: Save the contract end date and check if it is correct.
cat_vertrag_kuendigung_step2: Plan the return of devices or materials (if required).
cat_vertrag_kuendigung_step3: Check if there are any further obligations.
cat_vertrag_kuendigung_step4: File the cancellation notice as proof.
cat_vertrag_kuendigung_step5: Do not automatically delete the subscription or service from your devices afterwards.
cat_kuendigung_bestaetigung_summary: This message confirms that the company has received your cancellation request. This is an important formal document that proves your cancellation was processed. The company states the end date. This is very important to save as it is your only proof that the cancellation was submitted. If the company later claims that you did not want to cancel, you can use this message as evidence.
cat_kuendigung_bestaetigung_step1: Save the confirmation as conclusive proof.
cat_kuendigung_bestaetigung_step2: Check the end date – it must match your intended cancellation.
cat_kuendigung_bestaetigung_step3: Check if the date is accurate and contact the company if not.
cat_kuendigung_bestaetigung_step4: Do not delete this message – you may face disputes later.
cat_kuendigung_bestaetigung_step5: Use it as proof if the company later claims it did not receive the cancellation.
cat_kuendigung_anbieter_summary: This message means the provider (company) has decided to terminate your contract themselves. This is noteworthy and can have various reasons (e.g., service in your region is being discontinued, non-payment, violation of terms). You should check the reason for the cancellation and take action if needed. This could interrupt your service, so you should act quickly to find an alternative.
cat_kuendigung_anbieter_step1: Read the reason for cancellation carefully.
cat_kuendigung_anbieter_step2: Check the end date – when will the service end?
cat_kuendigung_anbieter_step3: If the reason is incorrect, contact the provider immediately.
cat_kuendigung_anbieter_step4: Look for an alternative service or another provider.
cat_kuendigung_anbieter_step5: Do not ignore the message – act quickly.
cat_vertrag_verlaengerung_summary: This message informs you that your contract will automatically be renewed for another period (usually 12 months) at the end of its current duration. This is a very important point that many people overlook, and it results in them unintentionally being locked into a new long-term contract. You must take action if you do not want to renew. The cancellation notice period is crucial – if you miss it, you must pay for another year.
cat_vertrag_verlaengerung_step1: Note the renewal deadline in your calendar.
cat_vertrag_verlaengerung_step2: Decide: Do you want to keep the contract or cancel it?
cat_vertrag_verlaengerung_step3: Check the cancellation notice period – how long in advance must you cancel?
cat_vertrag_verlaengerung_step4: If you want to cancel, submit the cancellation on time.
cat_vertrag_verlaengerung_step5: Save the cancellation confirmation if required.
cat_vertragsende_summary: This message informs you that your contract ends on the specified date. This is an informational letter where you must decide whether to renew or not. This is an opportunity to review your contract and make changes if you want. If you continue to need the service, you may need to enter into a new contract or find an alternative.
cat_vertragsende_step2: Decide: Do you still need the service?
cat_vertragsende_step3: If yes, look for a new contract with the provider or an alternative.
cat_vertragsende_step4: If no, do nothing – the contract ends automatically.
cat_vertragsende_step5: Check your account after the end date to ensure it is not being charged further.
cat_auslaender_abholung_eat_step3: Daten auf dem eAT nach Erhalt überprüfen.
cat_auslaender_ablehnung_step2: Innerhalb der Rechtsbehelfsfrist Widerspruch prüfen (1 Monat).
cat_auslaender_bewilligung_step1: Bescheid sorgfältig lesen und Auflagen notieren.
cat_auslaender_termin_step2: Alle geforderten Unterlagen vorbereiten (Pass, Foto, Aufenthaltstitel).
cat_auslaender_termin_step4: Bei Verhinderung Termin vorab absagen oder verlegen.
cat_auslaender_unterlagen_label: Ausländerbehörde – Aufforderung zur Vorlage von Unterlagen
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_step4: Fiktionsbescheinigung anfragen, falls Titel bereits abläuft.
cat_bank_kontoauszug_summary: This document shows all financial transactions on your account. This is not a problem, but it is very important to monitor your money and detect any error or unusual transaction.
cat_bank_kontoauszug_step2: Confirm that each transaction is correct.
cat_bank_kontoauszug_step5: Keep the statement as a reference.
cat_bank_lastschrift_summary: This notification means that an amount was debited from your account via direct debit with SEPA authorization. This is normal if you previously consented to it, but it can be dangerous if you do not remember this debit.
cat_bank_lastschrift_step1: Check the name of the creditor (Gläubiger).
cat_bank_lastschrift_step2: Make sure you authorized this debit.
cat_bank_lastschrift_step4: If the debit is unknown → Object immediately.
cat_bank_lastschrift_step5: Monitor your account for future debits.
cat_bank_ueberweisung_summary: This is a confirmation message that you have made a money transfer and it was completed successfully. It is not dangerous, but it is important as proof of payment.
cat_bank_ueberweisung_step4: Use it as proof of payment if needed.
cat_bank_ruecklastschrift_summary: This message means that the direct debit failed, usually because there is insufficient balance or a problem with the account. This is not an immediate major problem, but it can cause additional fees or problems with the company that attempted the debit.
cat_bank_ruecklastschrift_step3: Contact the party that attempted the debit.
cat_bank_ruecklastschrift_step5: Do not ignore to prevent escalation.
cat_bank_kreditkarte_summary: This is a report showing all transactions made with your credit card during a specific period. The danger here is in unknown transactions or errors.
cat_bank_kreditkarte_step3: Confirm that each transaction is from you.
cat_bank_sicherheitswarnung_summary: This message means the bank has detected unusual or suspicious activity on your account. This is one of the most dangerous messages because it may indicate a fraud attempt or security breach. Ignoring this can result in loss of money or misuse of your account.
cat_bank_sicherheitswarnung_step3: Ensure all transactions were made by you.
cat_bank_ueberziehung_summary: This message means your account is negative (negative balance). This is a sensitive situation because the bank may charge interest or fees. Keeping the account in the negative for a long time can lead to bigger financial problems.
cat_bank_ueberziehung_step2: Deposit an amount to cover the account.
cat_bank_ueberziehung_step3: Do not leave the account negative for long.
cat_bank_ueberziehung_step5: Watch for fees or interest charges.
cat_bank_gebuehren_summary: This message means the bank has deducted fees from your account (such as account maintenance fees). This is not dangerous, but it affects your account balance.
cat_bank_gebuehren_step2: Confirm that the fees are correct.
cat_bank_gebuehren_step5: Ask the bank if there is an error.
cat_bank_dauerauftrag_eingerichtet_summa: This message means that a recurring transfer (monthly or weekly) has been set up. This is useful for organization, but dangerous if activated accidentally.
cat_bank_dauerauftrag_geaendert_label: Bank – Standing Order Modified or Deleted
cat_bank_dauerauftrag_geaendert_summary: This message means that the recurring transfer has been modified, deleted, or stopped. You must be careful as this can affect important payments such as rent or subscriptions.
cat_bank_kartensperrung_summary: This message means your card has been temporarily blocked by the bank because suspicious activity or a security risk was detected. This is a protective measure, but it indicates that something is not right during processing. It must be handled immediately to secure your account.
cat_bank_kartensperrung_step3: Confirm whether the transactions are from you.
cat_bank_kartensperrung_step4: Request a new card if necessary.
cat_bank_kartensperrung_step5: Do not ignore the message under any circumstances.
cat_finanzamt_steuerbescheid_summary: This notice contains the final tax assessment after review of your tax return. The assessment shows the computed tax, amounts already paid, and the difference (payment due or refund). This is an important official document that directly affects your financial situation. Any payment due must be transferred by the specified deadline. Delayed or missed payments can result in interest charges or further actions.
cat_finanzamt_steuerbescheid_step1: Read the assessment carefully and verify all information is correct.
cat_finanzamt_steuerbescheid_step2: If there is a payment due, transfer the amount by the specified deadline.
cat_finanzamt_steuerbescheid_step3: Obtain the correct bank details from the assessment and include the assessment reference number in the transfer.
cat_finanzamt_steuerbescheid_step4: If there are unclear points or errors, consult a tax advisor or file an objection (deadline: 1 month).
cat_finanzamt_steuerbescheid_step5: Keep the assessment as official financial documentation and save the payment receipt.
cat_finanzamt_erstattung_summary: This is good news – the tax authority will refund money to you because you paid too much tax or had excess withholding. This is not an emergency and requires no immediate action from you. The amount will be automatically transferred to your bank account registered with the tax authority. Keep this as important financial documentation.
cat_finanzamt_erstattung_step1: No urgent action needed – refund will be processed automatically.
cat_finanzamt_erstattung_step2: Verify the refund amount and bank account details in the notice (ensure correctness).
cat_finanzamt_erstattung_step3: Wait for the transfer to your bank account (typically 2-4 weeks).
cat_finanzamt_erstattung_step4: Confirm the refund has arrived in your bank account.
cat_finanzamt_erstattung_step5: Save the notice and bank statement as proof.
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_label: Finanzamt – Request to File Tax Return
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_summary: The tax authority is requesting that you file a tax return for the specified year. This is a legally binding requirement and must be completed within the specified deadline. The deadline is binding and violations can result in fines (late filing penalties) or unfavorable tax assessments. This is not an emergency or collection notice – you still have time, but you should take the request seriously and not ignore it.
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_step1: Note the deadline carefully as specified in the letter (usually July 31 of the following year).
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_step2: Gather all required documents (income statements, receipts, bank statements).
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_step3: File the tax return before the deadline (also possible digitally via tax software or tax advisor).
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_step4: If needed, request a filing extension (standard extension to Dec 31 or with advisor to Feb 28 of next year).
cat_finanzamt_abgabe_step5: Save confirmation of filing as proof.
cat_finanzamt_verspaetung_summary: You filed your tax return late and the tax authority has assessed a late filing penalty. While not as critical as a collection notice, it signals that you missed a deadline. The assessed penalty must be paid. This is a warning – repeated late filings can result in higher penalties or additional problems. You should take this seriously and file on time in the future.
cat_finanzamt_verspaetung_step1: Read the penalty notice completely and verify the penalty amount.
cat_finanzamt_verspaetung_step2: Review the reason for late filing and plan buffer time before deadlines in the future.
cat_finanzamt_verspaetung_step3: Pay the penalty by the specified deadline.
cat_finanzamt_verspaetung_step4: If the penalty is unjustified or you have valid reasons, formally apply for relief (can sometimes be granted).
cat_finanzamt_verspaetung_step5: File all future tax returns on time and review them before the deadline.
cat_finanzamt_steuernachzahlung_summary: After reviewing your tax return, the tax authority has determined that you owe an additional amount. This may come after a tax assessment or as a separate notice. The additional payment is an official payment obligation and must be transferred by the specified deadline. This is not a collection notice or fine – it is a tax liability you have incurred. Ignoring or delaying can result in interest charges and further consequences.
cat_finanzamt_steuernachzahlung_step1: Note the additional payment amount and due date from the letter.
cat_finanzamt_steuernachzahlung_step2: Verify if the amount is correct (self-calculate or consult with tax advisor).
cat_finanzamt_steuernachzahlung_step3: Transfer the amount before the deadline and use the assessment number as reference.
cat_finanzamt_steuernachzahlung_step4: If you have payment difficulties, promptly apply for deferment or installment payment.
cat_finanzamt_steuernachzahlung_step5: Save payment proof and maintain organized records.
cat_finanzamt_vorauszahlung_summary: The tax authority has set advance income tax payments for the current year. These are regular payments (typically four times per year) that you must make to cover your tax liability throughout the year. This is not a collection notice or debt – it is a scheduled payment system. Missing these payments can result in interest charges. You should enter the payment dates in your calendar and transfer on time.
cat_finanzamt_vorauszahlung_step1: Note all payment dates (typically March 15, June 15, September 15, December 15).
cat_finanzamt_vorauszahlung_step2: For each payment, note the due amount and verify it.
cat_finanzamt_vorauszahlung_step3: Make each payment on time by the specified date (do not forget!).
cat_finanzamt_vorauszahlung_step4: Save payment receipts for each advance payment and document them.
cat_finanzamt_vorauszahlung_step5: After year-end: file your tax return to settle any over or underpayments.
cat_inkasso_step1: Forderung auf Richtigkeit und Verjährung prüfen.
cat_inkasso_step3: Nicht ignorieren – Klage oder Mahnbescheid drohen.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_bb_summary: This attachment serves to apply for benefits for unavoidable special needs and requires accurate cost estimates.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_step4: Distinguish between regular and irregular income.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ek_summary: This attachment serves to specify all types of income of the need group. It is important for the accurate calculation of benefits.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_eks_summary: This attachment is for self-employed persons and records income from self-employed or professional activities.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_step5: Understand the difference from the need group.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_hg_summary: This attachment records persons in your household community and is important for distinguishing from the need group.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step1: Enter current rent and additional costs.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step4: If you own the home, check special regulations.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_step5: Verify the accuracy of all information.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_kdu_summary: This attachment records your housing costs and is important for calculating the housing costs that the job center can cover.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step1: Enter personal data of the children.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_step2: Enter dates of birth and nationality.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ki_summary: This attachment records children under 15 years in the need group and is important for calculating child allowances and advance maintenance payments.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_meb_summary: This attachment serves to apply for additional needs for expensive nutrition when medically necessary diet is required.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_step2: If private insurance, check basic tariff.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_sv_summary: This attachment records your health and nursing care insurance and is important for calculating possible contributions to insurance premiums.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uf_summary: This attachment serves to report damage events and claim rights from accidents.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh1_step1: Anlage UH1 bei Trennungs- oder nachehelichem Unterhalt ausfüllen.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh2_step1: Anlage UH2 bei Schwangerschaft und Unterhaltsansprüchen ausfüllen.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh3_step1: Anlage UH3 ausfüllen wenn ein Elternteil außerhalb der Bedarfsgemeinschaft lebt.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh_step4: For child maintenance, observe special rules.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_uh_summary: This attachment records maintenance rights and obligations and is important for accurate benefit calculation.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_ve_summary: This attachment records persons in your responsibility and liability community and is important for benefit calculation.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_step3: Do not forget securities and cryptocurrencies.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_vm_summary: This attachment records all your assets and those of your need group. It is important for checking neediness.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step1: Enter personal data of the additional person.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_step2: Enter income and assets of the person.
cat_jobcenter_anlage_wep_summary: This attachment records additional persons in the need group over 15 years and is important for accurate benefit calculation.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step1: Ask your employer to complete the form.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step2: Verify the accuracy of all information.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_step5: Keep a copy for your files.
cat_jobcenter_arbeitsbescheinigung_summa: This form must be completed by your employer and confirms your employment relationship. It is important for calculating your benefits and proving your job readiness.
cat_jobcenter_ausfuellhinweise_step1: Hinweise sorgfältig lesen, bevor Sie den Antrag ausfüllen.
cat_jobcenter_einkommensbescheinigung_st: Ask your employer to complete the form.
Check the completeness of the information.
If necessary, ask your employer for clarification.
Submit the form by the deadline.
Keep a copy for your records.
cat_jobcenter_einkommensbescheinigung_su: This form must be completed by your employer and serves as proof of your salary amount. It is important for the accurate calculation of your benefit entitlements.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_step3: Provide information about the need group.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_step5: Submit the application complete and on time.
cat_jobcenter_hauptantrag_summary: This is the main application for applying for unemployment benefits. It forms the basis for your benefit provision and requires the specification of all relevant information about your need group.
cat_jobcenter_hinweise_summary: These instructions help you correctly fill out the job center's applications and forms.
cat_jobcenter_mietbescheinigung_step1: Formular dem Vermieter zur Ausfüllung vorlegen.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step1: Check the deadline for submitting documents.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_step5: If you encounter difficulties, contact the job center immediately.
cat_jobcenter_mitwirkung_summary: The job center requires you to submit certain documents or proofs by a deadline. This request is very important because non-compliance can lead to sanctions such as reduction of benefits.
cat_jobcenter_termin_step1: Enter the appointment in your calendar.
cat_jobcenter_termin_step3: Do not forget your ID card.
cat_jobcenter_termin_step4: Arrive on time for the appointment.
cat_jobcenter_termin_step5: If you cannot attend, cancel immediately.
cat_jobcenter_termin_summary: The job center invites you to a personal appointment. Attendance is usually mandatory and important for your benefit provision.
cat_jobcenter_veraenderung_step1: List all changes in your circumstances.
cat_jobcenter_veraenderung_summary: With this form, you inform the job center about important changes in your life circumstances. Timely notification is important for receiving correct benefits.
cat_jobcenter_weiterbewilligung_step3: Report any changes in your circumstances.
cat_jobcenter_weiterbewilligung_step5: Submit the application by the deadline.
cat_jobcenter_weiterbewilligung_summary: This application serves to extend your current approval period for unemployment benefits. Timely submission is important to avoid gaps in benefit provision.
cat_kaution_abrechnung_step1: Review the original security deposit amount.
cat_kaution_abrechnung_step5: Do not agree without thorough review.
cat_kaution_abrechnung_summary: This message explains how the security deposit was calculated after the end of the lease, including deductions (such as damages or additional costs). This is an important message because it determines how much you will actually receive.
cat_kaution_einbehalt_step1: Read the reason for retention carefully.
cat_kaution_einbehalt_step2: Check the validity of the claim.
cat_kaution_einbehalt_step5: Do not ignore the matter if it seems unreasonable.
cat_kaution_einbehalt_summary: This message means that the landlord will retain part of the security deposit due to existing damages or debts. This is not the most critical case, but it requires review because you may lose part of your money.
cat_kaution_rueckzahlung_step2: Compare with the original security deposit.
cat_kaution_rueckzahlung_summary: This message means that the security deposit will be returned to you after the end of the lease. This is a positive situation, but it requires follow-up to ensure that the amount is correct and the transfer has been made.
cat_kaution_step1: Check the security deposit amount in the rental agreement.
cat_kaution_step2: Keep the security deposit payment receipt.
cat_kaution_step3: When settling the security deposit: review deductions and object if necessary.
cat_kaution_step4: Expect refund of the security deposit within 3-6 months after moving out.
cat_kaution_vereinbarung_step2: Ensure it matches the rental agreement.
cat_kaution_vereinbarung_step3: Understand when and how it should be paid.
cat_kaution_vereinbarung_step4: Check if there is a security deposit account.
cat_kaution_vereinbarung_step5: Keep the agreement as an important document.
cat_kaution_vereinbarung_summary: This document specifies the security deposit amount that must be paid at the beginning of the lease. The security deposit is a guarantee for the landlord in case of future damages or debts. This is not a danger message, but very important because it involves a large amount of money that must be paid and its conditions understood precisely.
cat_kaution_zahlung_bestaetigung_step1: Keep the message as official proof.
cat_kaution_zahlung_bestaetigung_step5: Use it for any future disputes.
cat_kaution_zahlung_bestaetigung_summary: This message confirms that the landlord has received the security deposit amount. This is a very important document because it is the only proof that you paid the security deposit. Without it, you may face problems when reclaiming the amount later.
cat_kfz_evb_step2: Nummer aufbewahren bis die Zulassung abgeschlossen ist.
cat_kfz_schaden_step2: Reparaturauftrag nicht ohne Genehmigung der Versicherung erteilen.
cat_krankenkasse_beitrag_step3: Bei Änderungen des Einkommens ggf. Ermäßigung beantragen.
cat_krankenkasse_bescheinigung_step1: Bescheinigung speichern – wird für Behörden, Arbeitgeber oder Ausländerbehörde benötigt.
cat_krankenkasse_bescheinigung_step2: Bei Ausländerbehörde als Nachweis der Krankenversicherung vorlegen.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step2: Zeitraum und Höhe des Krankengeldes prüfen.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step1: Neue Krankenkasse rechtzeitig auswählen und anmelden.
cat_krankenkasse_mahnung_step2: Bei finanziellen Schwierigkeiten Ratenzahlung mit der Krankenkasse vereinbaren.
cat_krankenkasse_mahnung_step3: Nicht ignorieren – Rückstände können zu Leistungskürzungen führen.
cat_letzte_mahnung_step3: Bei bestrittener Forderung sofort schriftlich widersprechen.
cat_mahnbescheid_step1: DRINGEND: Frist von 2 Wochen für Widerspruch beachten.
cat_mahnbescheid_step3: Widerspruch einlegen, wenn Forderung falsch ist.
cat_mahnung_step1: Sofort prüfen, ob der Betrag korrekt ist.
cat_mahnung_step2: Zahlung unverzüglich durchführen oder Ratenzahlung vereinbaren.
cat_mieterhoehung_step1: Neue Miethöhe und Datum des Inkrafttretens prüfen.
cat_mieterhoehung_step2: Prüfen, ob die Erhöhung rechtmäßig ist (Mietspiegel).
cat_mieterhoehung_step3: Zustimmung geben oder widersprechen (innerhalb der gesetzlichen Frist).
cat_nebenkostenabrechnung_step3: Bei Unklarheiten innerhalb von 12 Monaten Einspruch einlegen.
cat_versicherung_schein_summary: This document is the basis of your insurance contract and proves that you are insured. It contains important information such as the policy number, type of insurance, start date, and coverage amount. Keep this document safely as you will need it if you have a claim or any problems.
cat_versicherung_schein_step1: Save the insurance certificate as an important document.
cat_versicherung_schein_step2: Verify the accuracy of the data (name, insurance type, date).
cat_versicherung_schein_step5: Do not lose this document as it is the basis for all insurance transactions.
cat_versicherung_beitrag_summary: This message means you need to pay the insurance premium. This is a direct financial obligation under the insurance contract, and if you do not pay, it may later result in a warning or even cancellation of your insurance.
cat_versicherung_beitrag_step1: Check the premium amount and due date.
cat_versicherung_beitrag_step2: Pay on time – not paying can result in loss of insurance coverage.
cat_versicherung_beitrag_step5: Make the payment before the due date.
cat_versicherung_beitragsanpassung_summa: This message means the insurance company has decided to change the premium (usually increase it). This is not an immediate emergency, but it is a decision point: either you accept the new premium or you cancel.
cat_versicherung_beitragsanpassung_step1: Compare the old and new premium.
cat_versicherung_beitragsanpassung_step2: Check the reason for the increase.
cat_versicherung_beitragsanpassung_step3: Decide if you want to continue.
cat_versicherung_beitragsanpassung_step5: Do not ignore the message as it affects your expenses.
cat_versicherung_schaden_meldung_summary: This message means the insurance company received your claim notification and has begun processing it. This is a follow-up phase and not a final decision.
cat_versicherung_schaden_meldung_step2: Keep all relevant documents and photos for the claim.
cat_versicherung_schaden_meldung_step3: Wait for the insurance company's response.
cat_versicherung_schadenregulierung_summ: This message means the insurance company has agreed to pay the compensation. This is a positive message, but you must verify that the amount is correct.
cat_versicherung_schadenregulierung_step: Track the money arriving in your account.
cat_versicherung_schaden_ablehnung_summa: This message means the insurance company has rejected your claim. This is one of the most important messages because it means you have no coverage from the insurance company.
cat_versicherung_schaden_ablehnung_step1: Read the reason for rejection carefully.
cat_versicherung_schaden_ablehnung_step2: Check if the decision is correct.
cat_versicherung_schaden_ablehnung_step5: Consider objecting if the decision is unreasonable.
cat_versicherung_vertragsverlaengerung_s: This message means your insurance contract will be renewed automatically. This is an important point because you may unintentionally commit yourself for another year.
Decide if you want to continue.
Pay attention to the cancellation period.
Cancel the contract if you no longer need it.
cat_versicherung_kuendigung_summary: This message confirms that your insurance contract will be terminated on a specific date. This is not an immediate emergency, but it is a very important document.
cat_versicherung_kuendigung_step3: Make sure it matches what you requested.
cat_versicherung_mahnung_nichtzahlung_su: This message is a reminder that you have not paid the insurance premium. This is a serious step because after this your insurance may be cancelled.
cat_versicherung_vertrag_beendet_label: Insurance – Contract Terminated Due to Non-Payment
cat_versicherung_vertrag_beendet_summary: This message means the insurance company has cancelled your contract due to non-payment. This is a serious problem because at this point you are without insurance coverage.
cat_versicherung_vertrag_beendet_step2: Pay the outstanding amount if possible.
cat_versicherung_vertrag_beendet_step4: Make sure you are not left without insurance.
cat_versicherung_vertrag_beendet_step5: Look for alternative insurance if necessary.
cat_vollstreckungsbescheid_step1: SOFORT handeln – Frist für Einspruch (2 Wochen) beachten.
cat_vollstreckungsbescheid_step3: Möglichkeit prüfen, die Schuld zu begleichen oder Ratenzahlung zu vereinbaren.
cat_zahlungserinnerung_step1: Prüfen, ob die Rechnung bereits bezahlt wurde.
cat_zahlungserinnerung_step2: Betrag sofort überweisen, falls noch nicht geschehen.
chooseNextAction: What would you like to do next?
dataProtectionNote: All your data is stored locally on your device. No data is transmitted to third parties. For more information, please check your privacy settings.
deleteConfirmMessage: This action will permanently delete all scanned documents, settings and backups. Continue?
deleteDocumentConfirm: Do you really want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
deleteImageConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
disclaimer: ⚠️ Disclaimer: This app is for demonstration purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. All data is stored locally on your device.
disclaimerContent1: The contents of this app have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
disclaimerContent2: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to § 7 para.1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.
gdprDescription: Your data belongs only to you
importConfirmMessage: Importing will replace all current data with the backup data. Continue?
impressumLawRef: Information provided according to § 5 Telemediengesetz (TMG) / applicable German law.
localStorageDescription: All data stays safely on your device
localStorageDetailed: All documents and data are stored exclusively on your device. No transfer to the cloud occurs.
markAsDoneConfirm: Mark this document as complete? Reminders will be cancelled.
notificationsDetailed: Reminders are processed locally on your device and are not forwarded to servers.
offlineFirstDetailed: The app works completely without an internet connection. Only when you want to share documents is a connection established.
pleaseCaptureOrSelectImages: Please capture or select images first
privacyConsent: By tapping 'Accept' you agree to our privacy policy. You can manage your data in settings at any time.
restoreConfirmMessage: Do you want to restore this backup? All current data will be replaced.
rightToAccessDescription: You can request an overview of all your stored data at any time.
rightToErasureDescription: You can permanently delete all your data from your device.
rightToPortabilityDescription: You can export your data as a backup and transfer it to other devices.
searchDescription: Enter a search term to find your documents
title: Title
tryDifferentSearch: Try searching with a different term
whatYouShouldHint: Fill out the extension form, attach a current bank statement, and submit it to the Jobcenter.
summary_unknown_document: This document could not be automatically categorized. Please review the content manually and select the appropriate category.
cat_mietvertrag_summary: This is the rental agreement that establishes your relationship with the landlord. It specifies the apartment address, rent amount (cold rent), utility costs, warm rent, and the start date of the lease. This is not a danger message, but it is one of the most important documents because any error could cause problems later in payment or housing rights.
cat_mietvertrag_step5: Keep a copy of the contract for your records.
cat_wohnungsgeberbestaetigung_summary: This is an official confirmation from the landlord that you moved into this apartment on a specific date. It is usually used for registration at the registry office. This is not a danger message, but a very important document because you need it for official registration.
cat_wohnungsgeberbestaetigung_step1: Verify the name, address, and move-in date.
cat_wohnungsgeberbestaetigung_step2: Use it for registration at the residents registration office.
cat_wohnungsgeberbestaetigung_step3: Do not delay registration if it is required.
cat_wohnungsgeberbestaetigung_step4: Keep a copy of the document.
cat_wohnungsgeberbestaetigung_step5: Ensure that all housing information is absolutely correct.
cat_mietbescheinigung_summary: This document confirms that you live in the apartment since a certain date and is used as proof of address or residence with various authorities. This is not a danger message, but an important supporting document.
cat_mietbescheinigung_step4: Keep a clear copy of it.
cat_mietbescheinigung_step5: Verify that the data is correct.
cat_nebenkostenabrechnung_summary: This message shows the annual utility costs such as heating, water, and services, and indicates whether you owe additional money (Nachzahlung) or have a credit balance (Guthaben). This is a very important message because it directly affects your money, and there may be a large difference between what you paid and what is due.
cat_nebenkostenabrechnung_step5: Keep the message as an important reference.
cat_mieterhoehung_summary: This message means that the landlord or administration has notified you of a rent increase from a specific date. This is not an immediate danger message, but it is important because you will pay more, and you must ensure that the increase is clear and the date is specified.
cat_mieterhoehung_step5: Do not ignore it because it affects your monthly expenses.
cat_miete_kuendigung_summary: This message means that the lease agreement will be terminated on a specific date. This is a very important message because it directly affects your housing situation. You must handle it seriously and understand the termination date and what needs to be arranged afterwards.
cat_miete_kuendigung_step5: Do not ignore it at all.
cat_fristlose_kuendigung_mietruckstand_l: Immediate Termination Due to Rent Arrears
cat_fristlose_kuendigung_mietruckstand_s: This is a very dangerous message and means that the landlord has immediately terminated the lease because of rent arrears. This is not an ordinary message, but a real warning at the housing level itself, and it could lead to legal problems or loss of housing if not handled quickly.
Act immediately and do not delay.
Review the amount of open rent arrears.
Try to resolve the rent issue quickly.
Consider this a very urgent case.
cat_hausordnung_summary: This document contains the house rules that all residents must follow, such as quiet hours and proper use of common areas and cleanliness. This is not a danger message, but it is important to prevent problems with neighbors or administration.
cat_hausordnung_step5: Do not ignore it because violation could cause problems.
cat_uebergabeprotokoll_summary: This document proves the condition of the apartment when it was handed over or received, with meter readings and notes. This is one of the most important documents when moving because any future dispute usually refers back to it.
cat_uebergabeprotokoll_step5: Do not sign before confirming all details.
cat_mietruckstand_zahlungserinnerung_sum: This is a very dangerous message and means that the landlord has immediately terminated the lease because of rent arrears. This is not an ordinary message, but a real warning at the housing level itself, and it could lead to legal problems or loss of housing if not handled quickly.
cat_mietruckstand_zahlungserinnerung_ste: Verify the amount of arrears owed.
Try to resolve the rent issue quickly.
Consider this a very urgent case.
cat_modernisierungsankundigung_summary: This message means that the landlord or administration will carry out renovation or modernization work in the building. This is not a danger message, but it is important because it could affect your comfort in the apartment or future rent.
cat_modernisierungsankundigung_step1: Review the start date of the work.
cat_modernisierungsankundigung_step2: Understand the scope of the modernization mentioned.
cat_modernisierungsankundigung_step4: Pay attention if there is an impact on the apartment or costs.
cat_reparaturankundigung_summary: This message means that there is a date for a technician or maintenance company to enter the apartment to fix a problem such as heating or water. This is not a danger message, but it is important because it requires preparation from you and coordination with the date.
cat_reparaturankundigung_step2: Ensure that the technician can access the apartment.
cat_reparaturankundigung_step5: Do not miss the date if your presence is necessary.
cat_rechnung_summary: This is a standard payment request for a service or product provided. It is the starting point of any financial obligation and does not indicate a problem – as long as you pay on time.
cat_rechnung_step5: If there are any discrepancies, contact the sender immediately.
cat_zahlungserinnerung_summary: This message means that no payment has been registered for the previous invoice. It is a reminder before escalation. Ignoring it will typically lead to a formal warning notice.
cat_zahlungserinnerung_step5: Do not ignore – the next stage is a formal warning notice.
cat_mahnung_summary: This is a formal warning letter meaning the company has started serious steps to collect the amount. Delays can lead to additional fees or referral to a debt collection agency.
cat_mahnung_step5: If you dispute the claim, object in writing immediately.
cat_letzte_mahnung_summary: This is the final stage before referral to a debt collection agency. If you do not pay now, costs will rise and the situation becomes significantly harder. This is your last opportunity before escalation.
cat_letzte_mahnung_step4: Pay close attention to the "at the latest" deadline.
cat_letzte_mahnung_step5: If unable to pay: immediately arrange a payment plan.
cat_inkasso_summary: This message means the debt has been transferred to a collection agency. It is no longer just the original company – an external party has added additional fees. The amount is growing and the situation is becoming more serious.
cat_inkasso_step5: Secure all documents and payment receipts.
cat_mahnbescheid_summary: This is an official court letter as part of a legal dunning procedure. You typically have 14 days to file an objection. Ignoring it can lead to an automatic judgment against you.
cat_mahnbescheid_step5: Document all papers and deadlines in writing.
cat_vollstreckungsbescheid_summary: This means the court has permitted enforcement of the debt. If you have reached this point without responding, the creditor now has the right to initiate measures such as seizure.
cat_vollstreckungsbescheid_step4: Seek legal advice or debt counselling.
cat_vollstreckungsbescheid_step5: Treat as an emergency – immediate action required.
cat_zwangsvollstreckung_summary: This is the most dangerous phase and means the start of actual enforcement, such as seizure or the involvement of a bailiff. It is no longer about letters – this is real enforcement.
cat_zwangsvollstreckung_step2: Do not ignore the situation under any circumstances.
cat_auslaender_termin_summary: This message means you have an appointment at the immigration office. Not attending may delay your file.
cat_auslaender_termin_step5: Keep a copy of the invitation letter.
cat_auslaender_unterlagen_summary: Your file still requires documents before a decision can be made. Failing to submit may stop the processing or lead to a rejection.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_summary: Your current residence permit is expiring soon and you need to apply for an extension. Delaying the application can lead to legal or practical problems.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_step5: Do not wait until the last days.
cat_auslaender_bewilligung_summary: Your application has been approved or the residence permit will be issued. This is positive news, but pay attention to the expiry date or further steps.
cat_auslaender_bewilligung_step4: Add a reminder before the residence permit expires.
cat_auslaender_bewilligung_step5: Keep a PDF or copy of the document.
cat_auslaender_ablehnung_summary: There is a fundamental problem in your file or the application has been rejected. Ignoring it may close the file or leave the situation dangerously unresolved.
cat_auslaender_ablehnung_step5: Treat as an urgent matter, not just information.
cat_auslaender_fiktionsbescheinigung_sum: This is a certificate confirming that your right of residence temporarily continues during the processing of your application. It is not a final decision.
cat_auslaender_fiktionsbescheinigung_ste: Keep the certificate in a safe place.
Do not confuse it with a final approval.
cat_auslaender_abholung_eat_summary: The main processing phase is complete and the electronic residence permit is ready for collection. This is not a new application stage but a collection phase.
cat_auslaender_abholung_eat_step4: Present the letter when collecting, if required.
cat_auslaender_abholung_eat_step5: Do not confuse it with a new appointment.
cat_auslaender_termin_online_label: Immigration Office – Appointment after Online Application
cat_auslaender_termin_online_summary: Your online application has moved to a new stage and the immigration office is requesting your personal appearance. Not attending may stop the progress of your application.
cat_auslaender_termin_online_step1: Add the appointment to your calendar immediately.
cat_auslaender_termin_online_step2: Prepare your passport and any forms to be signed.
cat_auslaender_termin_online_step3: Prepare any additional documents mentioned in the letter.
cat_auslaender_termin_online_step5: Bring a copy of the letter to present if needed.
cat_auslaender_terminaenderung_summary: This letter replaces the old appointment with a new one. The old appointment is no longer valid. Ignoring this letter may cause you to appear on the wrong day or miss the correct appointment.
cat_auslaender_terminaenderung_step1: Delete or mark the old appointment as cancelled.
cat_auslaender_terminaenderung_step3: Update the reminder in the app.
cat_auslaender_terminaenderung_step4: Prepare the same documents as before, unless stated otherwise.
cat_auslaender_terminaenderung_step5: Do not rely on any old notifications.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_label: Immigration Office – Supplementary Request after Incomplete Application
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_summary: Your application has been received but is incomplete and cannot be processed further without the missing documents. The file exists but is blocked.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step1: Consider the application incomplete until further notice.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step2: Identify each missing document one by one.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step3: Gather the documents as quickly as possible.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step4: Submit via the method stated in the letter.
cat_auslaender_nachforderung_step5: Do not assume the application will be completed automatically without these documents.
cat_auslaender_verlaengerung_vorsprache_: Immigration Office – Extension with Subsequent In-Person Appointment

The extension process takes place in two steps: first submit the application, then after review you will receive an appointment for a personal appearance. It is important not to confuse submission with the appointment.
Do not expect an appointment before submitting the application.
Gather the required documents and submit them.
Wait for a later notification if an appointment after review was indicated.
Do not add an appointment to the calendar unless it actually exists.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_label: Immigration Office – File Upload Instructions for Online Form
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_summary: This letter does not request new documents but explains the correct way to upload files in the online form. Uploading incorrectly may lead to rejection even if the documents are ready.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step1: Upload files directly in the form if required.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step2: Use accepted formats such as PDF or JPEG.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step3: Ensure files are clear and legible.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step4: Do not send documents by another method unless stated.
cat_auslaender_upload_hinweis_step5: Keep a copy of the uploaded files.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_label: Immigration Office – First Application / Application for Issuance
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_summary: You are at the beginning of the process for the first time. Missing documents here affect the entire file from the very start.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step1: Consider it a new first-time application.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step2: Prepare a colour copy of the passport if required.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step4: Attach proof of the purpose of residence.
cat_auslaender_erstantrag_step5: Check that the file is complete before submitting.
cat_auslaender_bewilligung_nebenbestimmu: Immigration Office – Approval with Additional Conditions
This is an approval, but not unconditional – there are attached conditions or notes that you must pay attention to. Ignoring the conditions may affect work, residence type or future obligations.
Initially treat the letter as an approval.
Do not just read the word "approval".
Keep the conditions together with the decision in the same file.
Check any restrictions or notes linked to the residence permit.
cat_auslaender_ablehnung_voraussetzungen: Immigration Office – Rejection due to Missing Legal Requirements

The problem is not just missing documents but that the legal requirements themselves are currently not met according to the authority's assessment. This is more serious than a simple supplementary request.
Identify which requirements were not met.
Do not treat it as a simple request for missing documents.
Check whether further steps or explanations are mentioned in the letter.
Treat as very high priority in the app.
cat_auslaender_online_bestaetigung_label: Immigration Office – Online Application Confirmation / Interim Status
cat_auslaender_online_bestaetigung_summa: There is a confirmation after submitting the online application, possibly containing important text stating that your current residence temporarily continues beyond the previous expiry date until a decision is made. This is not a final approval.
cat_auslaender_online_bestaetigung_step1: Save the confirmation immediately as a PDF.
cat_auslaender_online_bestaetigung_step2: Read the text regarding the temporary continuation of residence.
cat_auslaender_online_bestaetigung_step4: Do not regard it as a new final residence permit.
cat_auslaender_online_bestaetigung_step5: Use it only within the limits of what is written.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltserlaubnis_besc: Immigration Office – Residence Permit for Employment
This is an application for a work-related residence permit. The purpose of residence is directly tied to the position, and missing work documents can directly block or delay the file.
Classify it as a work residence permit.
Prepare the employment contract or binding job offer.
Attach proof of income if required.
Prepare proof of accommodation and health insurance.
Ensure all work documents are clear and up to date.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_summary: This is an application for the EU Blue Card, tied to qualified work and specific salary and conditions. This category must be distinguished from a normal work residence permit as it is not the same track.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step1: Classify it as a Blue Card application.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step3: Attach employment contract or binding offer.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step4: Check if approval from the Federal Employment Agency was mentioned.
cat_auslaender_blaue_karte_step5: Do not confuse with a normal extension or general work residence permit.
cat_auslaender_niederlassungserlaubnis_l: Immigration Office – Permanent Settlement Permit (Blue Card Holders)
cat_auslaender_niederlassungserlaubnis_s: This letter is not about a normal extension but about the possibility of transitioning to an unlimited permanent residence permit if the conditions are met. The track is different: it is an upgrade in residence type.
Classify it as a permanent residence permit.
Link it to the current Blue Card status.
Check whether the stated or required conditions are met.
Do not treat it as a routine extension.
Prepare documents proving the conditions are met, if required.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltserlaubnis_stud: Immigration Office – Residence Permit for Study
This is an application for a study-related residence permit. If any element is missing (proof of enrolment, health insurance, proof of sufficient funds), the file is considered incomplete.
Classify it as a study residence permit.
Prepare proof of funding or financial security.
Submit all proofs together if possible.
cat_auslaender_aufenthaltserlaubnis_ausb: Immigration Office – Residence Permit for Vocational Training

This letter concerns a residence permit for vocational or practical training. The most important document is usually the training contract. This category must be distinguished from study as the document logic differs slightly.
Prepare the training contract or programme proof.
Ensure the contract is current and clear.
Check whether additional documents from the training institution are required.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_label: Immigration Office – Family Reunification / Spouse / Child
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_summary: This is an application for family reunification or a residence permit for a spouse/child. Important elements are not just passport and photo but also proof of family relationship and adequate housing.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step2: Prepare proof of the family relationship.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step4: Attach passport and biometric photo if required.
cat_auslaender_familiennachzug_step5: Ensure all family documents are clear and acceptable.
cat_auslaender_gebuehren_summary: This letter does not request documents or grant an appointment, but draws attention to a financial fee for the required procedure. It is a financial obligation, not a document step.
cat_auslaender_gebuehren_step1: Classify it as a fee notice, not a document request.
cat_auslaender_gebuehren_step2: Read the fee amount or type of service if stated.
cat_auslaender_gebuehren_step3: Keep the notice with the application file.
cat_auslaender_gebuehren_step4: Do not confuse with an approval or rejection decision.
cat_auslaender_gebuehren_step5: Follow any related payment or collection instructions.
cat_krankenkasse_bescheinigung_summary: This document is official proof that you have health insurance. It is often required by authorities, employers or the immigration office. It is not an application or problem – it is proof.
cat_krankenkasse_bescheinigung_step3: Keep it as part of your health insurance documents.
cat_krankenkasse_bescheinigung_step4: Use it as proof of insurance when needed.
cat_krankenkasse_bescheinigung_step5: Keep a PDF or photo for later use.
cat_krankenkasse_beitrag_summary: This message means the health insurance has informed you of the monthly contribution or outstanding payments. Ignoring it can lead to accumulation of amounts or payment problems.
cat_krankenkasse_beitrag_step4: Keep the notice in your health insurance file.
cat_krankenkasse_beitrag_step5: Do not delay if there is an outstanding amount or a discrepancy in the figure.
cat_krankenkasse_mahnung_summary: This message means the health insurance has warned you about payment arrears. Arrears can restrict insurance benefits. Ignoring it can lead to further escalation stages.
cat_krankenkasse_mahnung_step4: Do not ignore – arrears may lead to reductions in benefits.
cat_krankenkasse_mahnung_step5: Secure all correspondence and payment receipts.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_summary: This message or transaction concerns the application for sick pay when you are unable to work for an extended period. The health insurance may request additional documents. Delays in submission can delay payment.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step4: Submit all documents as quickly as possible.
cat_krankenkasse_krankengeld_step5: Keep a copy of all submitted documents and proof of submission.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_summary: This message or transaction concerns the termination of health insurance membership. Although it may be a normal administrative step when switching, it is important as it must not leave the person without continuous coverage.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step4: Keep all cancellation or confirmation documents.
cat_krankenkasse_kuendigung_step5: Avoid any gap in insurance coverage.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_summary: This form is used when someone wants to join a health insurance or register a new membership. Missing data can delay registration or hold up membership confirmation.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step1: Fill in the application completely without leaving mandatory fields empty.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step3: Add previous insurance details if required.
cat_krankenkasse_mitgliedsantrag_step5: Keep a copy of the form after submission.
cat_krankenkasse_familienversicherung_su: This form is used to add a spouse or children to health insurance within family insurance. Incorrect or missing data can delay the addition.
cat_krankenkasse_familienversicherung_st: Prepare the data of the family member to be added.
Enter name, date of birth and family relationship correctly.
Check whether supporting documents are required.
Send the complete application to the health insurance.
Keep a copy of the submitted information.
cat_krankenkasse_gesundheitskarte_summar: This message means your electronic health card has been issued or is ready for collection. This is not an application but a notice about a daily-use document at the doctor or hospital.
cat_krankenkasse_gesundheitskarte_step1: Keep the card or notice in a safe place.
cat_krankenkasse_gesundheitskarte_step2: Use the card when visiting the doctor or hospital.
cat_krankenkasse_gesundheitskarte_step3: Do not treat it as a letter requiring the sending of documents.
cat_krankenkasse_gesundheitskarte_step4: Save the letter or notice as a reference.
cat_krankenkasse_gesundheitskarte_step5: Ensure the card has been received or activated if stated.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_label: Health Insurance – Data Update / Address Change / Bank Details
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_summary: This form is used to update personal details such as address or bank account with the health insurance. A delay can affect deliveries or transfers.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step1: Identify which data needs to be changed.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step2: Enter the new data accurately and clearly.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step3: Check address or bank details before submitting.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step4: Send the update to the health insurance.
cat_krankenkasse_datenaenderung_step5: Keep a copy of the form after updating.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_label: Health Insurance – Care Services / Long-term Care Insurance
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_summar: This message concerns the application for long-term care services or the assessment of care needs. Missing proof or documents can delay the assessment or the start of the service.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step1: Classify it as a care or long-term care insurance application.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step2: Read the type of service mentioned in the letter.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step4: Submit the application or supplementary information via the method stated.
cat_krankenkasse_pflegeleistungen_step5: Follow up on the file – this transaction usually does not end in one step.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_summary: This transaction concerns an application for household help when the person is unable to manage the household due to illness, pregnancy or hospital stay. It is important to note the reason, the period and any conditions mentioned in the letter.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step1: State the reason mentioned in the application or letter.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step2: Enter the required or requested period accurately.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step3: Prepare medical proof or supporting documents if needed.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step4: Submit the application via the method stated.
cat_krankenkasse_haushaltshilfe_step5: Keep a copy of the application and attachments.
cat_krankenkasse_kostenerstattung_summar: This message means you can submit an invoice to the health insurance for reimbursement of medical costs, or that the insurance will cover the costs directly. It is important to submit the invoice quickly.
cat_krankenkasse_kostenerstattung_step1: Submit the invoice or required documents.
cat_krankenkasse_kostenerstattung_step2: Send original invoices or copies as required.
cat_krankenkasse_kostenerstattung_step5: Keep a copy of the submitted documents.
cat_hausordnung_step2: Pay attention to quiet hours and shared areas.
cat_hausordnung_step3: Keep the document for later reference.
cat_mietbescheinigung_step1: Keep the certificate for authorities or employer.
cat_mietbescheinigung_step3: Present as proof of residence when required.
cat_uebergabeprotokoll_step1: Read the protocol carefully and check all points.
cat_uebergabeprotokoll_step2: Confirm meter readings and number of keys.
cat_uebergabeprotokoll_step3: Keep a copy of the protocol.
